title: Nvidia’s Brilliant ‘Freemium’ Software Hook is Why I’m Loading Up for The Long Term
excerpt: NVIDIA gives away its most powerful software for free, and that single decision is why its hardware business has become nearly impossible to compete with or...
content_html:
Alex Sirois

Wed, July 22, 2026 at 10:03 AM EDT 4 min read

Quick Read

  • NVDA's free CUDA ecosystem locks developers into its hardware, delivering 85% revenue growth, 71% gross margins, and $48B in quarterly free cash flow.

  • China contributes zero to NVDA's $91B Q2 guidance, while Blackwell and Rubin carry $1 trillion in revenue visibility through 2027.

  • AMD lacks CUDA and Broadcom's ASICs miss the developer lock-in that lets NVDA's single-quarter Data Center revenue exceed AMD's entire annual base.

  • Don't wait: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just revealed his top 10 AI stocks. See the full list FREE now.

I keep buying NVIDIA, and the reason has almost nothing to do with the chips. It's the software giveaway underneath them. Most investors file NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) under "hardware," and that framing is exactly why I'm still adding at $207.29. What I actually own is a freemium platform that happens to sell the world's most expensive accelerators on the back end.

The Free Tier Is the Trap

CUDA is free. Triton is free. NIMs, Dynamo 1.0, Nemotron, BioNeMo, Isaac, Omniverse. All free. Every graduate student, startup, and hyperscaler research team writes code against these libraries. Then the code only runs at full speed on NVIDIA silicon. "NVIDIA has the largest suite of acceleration libraries in the world," Jensen Huang told analysts on the May call, and that's the moat in plain language.

The paywall shows up at scale. When a customer moves from prototype to production, they build an AI factory rather than purchasing a single GPU. CFO Colette Kress framed it plainly: "Customers do not buy GPUs; they build AI factories. The right economic metric is not the purchase price of the GPU; it is the lifetime cost of an AI factory producing intelligence." Switching costs at that level are brutal. You'd rewrite years of CUDA-optimized code, retrain teams, and lose performance. Almost nobody does it.

Don't wait: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just revealed his top 10 AI stocks. See the full list FREE now.

The Receipts

Three numbers keep the buy button warm. First, growth that shouldn't be possible at this size. Q1 FY2027 revenue hit $81.615 billion, up 85.23% year over year, with Data Center alone at $75.246 billion (+92%). Networking inside that number grew 199% YoY. Management guided Q2 to $91.0 billion.

Second, the margin structure the software stack enables. Gross margin 71.07%, operating margin 60.38%, ROE 101.5%, ROIC 92.2%. Free cash flow of $48.554 billion in a single quarter. Those are software-company economics attached to a hardware volume business.

content_html_zh:
亚历克斯·西罗伊斯

2026 年 7 月 22 日星期三，美国东部时间上午 10:03 阅读 4 分钟

快速阅读

  • NVDA 的免费 CUDA 生态系统将开发人员锁定在其硬件中，实现 85% 的收入增长、71% 的毛利率和 48B 美元的季度自由现金流。
  • 中国对 NVDA 第二季度 91B 美元指导的贡献为零，而 Blackwell 和 Rubin 到 2027 年的收入可见度为 1 万亿美元。
  • AMD 缺乏 CUDA，Broadcom 的 ASIC 也缺少开发者锁定，而这使得 NVDA 的单季度数据中心收入超过了 AMD 的整个年度基数。
  • 不要等待：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚透露了他最喜欢的 10 只人工智能股票。 立即免费查看完整列表。

我一直买NVIDIA，原因几乎与芯片无关。 这是它们下面的软件赠品。 大多数投资者将 NVIDIA（纳斯达克股票代码：NVDA）归入“硬件”类别，而这一框架正是我仍以 207.29 美元买入的原因。 我实际上拥有的是一个免费增值平台，该平台恰好在后端销售世界上最昂贵的加速器。

免费套餐是陷阱

CUDA 是免费的。 海卫一是免费的。 NIM、Dynamo 1.0、Nemotron、BioNeMo、Isaac、Omniverse。 全部免费。 每个研究生、初创公司和超大规模研究团队都会针对这些库编写代码。 然后代码只能在 NVIDIA 芯片上全速运行。 “NVIDIA 拥有世界上最大的加速库套件，”黄仁勋在 5 月份的电话会议上对分析师表示，用简单的语言来说，这就是护城河。

付费墙大规模出现。 当客户从原型转向生产时，他们会构建一个人工智能工厂，而不是购买单个 GPU。 首席财务官科莱特·克雷斯 (Colette Kress) 直言不讳地说：“客户不购买 GPU；他们建造人工智能工厂。 正确的经济指标不是 GPU 的购买价格，而是 GPU 的购买价格。这是生产智能的人工智能工厂的终生成本。” 在这个水平上的转换成本是残酷的。 您将重写多年的 CUDA 优化代码、重新培训团队并损失性能。 几乎没有人这样做。

不要等待：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚透露了他最喜欢的 10 只人工智能股票。 立即免费查看完整列表。

收据

三个数字让购买按钮保持温暖。 首先，这种规模的增长是不可能的。 2027 财年第一季度收入达到 816.15 亿美元，同比增长 85.23%，其中数据中心收入达到 752.46 亿美元（增长 92%）。 该数字中的网络数量同比增长 199%。 管理层预计第二季度营收为 910 亿美元。

其次，软件堆栈支持的边际结构。 毛利率71.07%，营业利润率60.38%，净资产收益率101.5%，投资资本回报率92.2%。 单季度自由现金流为485.54亿美元。 这些是附属于硬件批量业务的软件公司经济学。
